creator: franco@francocorbelli.com
text:
Created attachment 225546
the shar of the port

Swiss army knife for the serious backup and disaster recovery manager.
Advanced backup also for virtual machines, with deduplication and versioning (special functions for zfs' snapshots)

About like 7z or RAR on steroids.
Many of them.

Keeps a forever-to-ever copy (even thousands of versions) of files, conceptually similar to Mac time machines, but much more efficiently.

Fork of zpaq (already in /ports/archive/paq), abandonated from 2014

Runs on:
Windows, Linux, FreeBSD

Maybe:
QNAP NAS, ESXi, Mac

WWW: https://github.com/fcorbelli/zpaqfranz
